name: Bukayo Saka

current_form.value: Premier League champion with Arsenal in 2025-26 (ending the club's ~21-year league-title wait) and part of their run to the Champions League final vs PSG. Reported ~7 league goals and 5 assists in 31 league appearances (minutes managed); signed a new long-term contract (reported to 2031) in February 2026.

fitness.value: Fit; no injury reported. Named to England's 26-man World Cup squad and given the No. 7 shirt.

wc_role.value: Key starting winger for Tuchel's England; one of the side's primary attacking threats, wearing No. 7.

image_todo: fetch + verify a Creative-Commons portrait; no fabricated URLs
